transcript.clean_text: there was a misty High Cloud at the beginning of stage 14 that soon burnt off and so did a group of 18 Riders as part of a highquality breakaway that went for it in the run to Pico Valas dead center of the stage a peak that everyone feared the BOS only 3 km in length so how come a category 1 because it had ramps of more than 20% by the time our Breakaway got there they were starting to attack each other and Roman B was looking for mountains points he' already taken the category three test at the beginning of the day and wanted these as well B Julie took control of the king of the mountains competition over the top moving nine points clear of Caruso who was within the main body of the pelan that were chasing on as the pelan rode together the Breakaway were attacking each other niik prudom decided to push on leaving Clement Chapan an easier ride Holmes was part of that Trio but a rear puncture paid to his Challenge and we thought this had done the same for Jay Vine big moment we thought he might even be out of the race not a bit of it he was to pick himself back up of the asphal and get a spectacular finish meanwhile prudom Navaro and Van Mark were pushing on Pam suddenly was alone and we were asking ourselves why and then we saw this replay Van Mark difficult Corner was just about to get through it and then Navaro took his front wheel away leaving prudom alone and up front he was pushing on as best he could and on the final Peak zes tried to bridge over to him prudon working for Clore chapela was part of a ever more selective Breakaway that started to fracture itself B pushed on leaving shaoan the man he feared most for the final test along with pidcock and others in that group 6.2 km to go and B still very much in charge he rounded both zes and prudom and went for it jayvine remarkably was back in this race and he riding with Jesus herada were trying to close the gap on B but he just kept extending it by the time we headed to the line it looked like the Frenchman would get his first Grand Tour win outside of France B switched to team DSM many wondered about the wisdom of that but it seemed a very wise move indeed he gets a stage win to make it three for the team what a Welter they are having and what a day it turned out to be for so many Vine finishing third behind hazer sraa in that Podium Sprint meanwhile our attention turned further down the mountain B manga Lopez with the desire to test Primos rogich he went off for mistar leaving Mass an easier ride within the pack but the Gap he established was to be snuffed out rogl determined in the final Sprint to put the hammer down and in so doing caused some worry I'm sure for old Christian iiking in the leader Jersey who' been challenged on this stage by guon Martin so Lopez hit the line and then a quartet of greats behind him rogich with mass Burnal and ha then a bit more of a gap back to Adam Yates indeed yet more great Riders who will animate the remainder of this race an incredible day of racing so many great stories not least there odd Christian iing coming across the line just giving away two seconds to gu Mar overall b's day in certainly was not only winning the stage but also taking control of that polka dot Jersey har behind him ahead of Vine pitcock chapuza Holmes zit jates prudom but just look at the rest of the Breakaway Anor dear hanging on the Sprinter for a last Point finishing in 15th Place just ahead of Lopez odd Christian Ying stays in the red jersey going into another climbing day ahead of the rest day hi King leading by 54 seconds ahead of guon Maran rogich mass and Lopez your top five with plenty of racing still to come B will wear the polka dots and I imagine he'll be hunting yet more points as we head to the finish of Stage 15 tomorrow which will introduce us to the rest day B leads on 50 points 19 clear of Caruso but with two category one tests on stage 15 yet more points are up for grabs and surely we'll reach out for them well they say the feistiest fights are in Barrack rooms and tomorrow we head to El baraco and this is what the profile looks like two category one tests sandwiching a category 2 the final climb may only be a count three but it's a downhill run to the line and you can be certain it will be full of drama as it always is on love Welter
